calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Petitioner: Alice Mu Peng, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for /and with/ the Minor: Jacky M. Gin Kwong, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of a Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jacky m. Luo.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-17-2007 Reset To Jun-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Petitioner: Alice Mu Peng, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jacky M. Gin Kwong, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to June 7, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit an Application with Declaration for an Order dispensing with notice.
The Court waived re-publication requirement.
